name: Affinity One
description_short: Member-owned federal credit union serving southern Chautauqua County since 1948, offering competitive auto loans, personal loans, credit cards, and savings products with no-fee ATM network access.
description_long:
Affinity One Federal Credit Union was organized in 1948 and currently serves over 4,300 members in southern Chautauqua County, New York. As a federally-chartered credit union (NCUA-insured), the organization operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned model with a stated mission to treat members as more than just account numbers.

Affinity One offers a comprehensive range of consumer financial products including auto loans (as low as 3.99%), personal signature loans (as low as 7.99%), share secure loans for credit building (as low as 3.00%), home equity loans, no-annual-fee Visa credit cards (9.99% APR with 0% intro on balance transfers), share checking accounts with no monthly fees, savings accounts, money market accounts, and term share certificates. Members can refinance auto loans from other institutions and receive a $100 reward. The credit union also provides web banking and bill payment services at two physical branches.

The credit union's primary distinguishing feature is its no-fee ATM network—members have access to over 30 no-fee locations through an agreement with M&T Bank nationwide, plus an ATM at their Lakewood branch. The organization emphasizes personal service and community banking, serving members who live, work, worship, or attend school in their service area. Operating hours extend to 5:00 PM on Thursdays at the Jamestown branch.

As a smaller regional credit union with only two physical locations, Affinity One offers competitive rates and a member-focused approach typical of well-established credit unions. However, the limited branch network and service area restriction may not suit all consumers, particularly those outside southern Chautauqua County or preferring extensive in-person banking options.
services: Share checking accounts with no monthly fees and overdraft protection
Auto loans for new and used vehicles, motorcycles, and recreational vehicles
Signature select personal loans for purchases, home improvements, and unexpected expenses
Share secure loans for credit re-establishment and credit building
Home equity loans for remodeling and home improvement projects
No-annual-fee Visa credit cards with rewards and 0% balance transfer intro period
Term share certificates with fixed rates and federal insurance
Money market accounts with compounded monthly dividends
Web banking and online bill payment
Auto loan refinancing with $100 cash reward
ATM access through M&T Bank network (30+ locations nationwide) plus in-branch ATM
pros: No-annual-fee Visa credit card with 0% APR for 6 months on qualifying balance transfers and same cash advance rate as purchases
Auto loan rates as low as 3.99% with $100 refinancing incentive for qualifying borrowers
Share checking accounts with no monthly fees, no minimum balance requirement, and overdraft protection
Access to 30+ no-fee ATM locations through M&T Bank partnership nationwide plus in-branch ATM
Share secure loans starting at 3.00% APR to help members re-establish credit
Money market accounts with monthly compounded dividends and no lockup period
Extended Thursday hours (until 5:00 PM) at Jamestown branch for working members
cons: Limited to two physical branch locations (Lakewood and Jamestown) serving only southern Chautauqua County area
Membership restricted to those who live, work, worship, or attend school in defined service area
Auto loan and signature loan rates advertised as 'as low as' with qualification requirements not fully detailed
Small institution with fewer than 4,400 members may offer limited product customization compared to larger credit unions
Website does not clearly display current rates for savings accounts, money market accounts, or CDs
best_for: Residents and workers in southern Chautauqua County, New York seeking personal relationship-based banking
Auto loan borrowers looking to refinance with incentives and competitive rates
Consumers rebuilding credit through share secure loans and credit-builder programs
Members wanting to avoid credit card annual fees while accessing balance transfer promotions
diagnosis: Affinity One is best for members in southern Chautauqua County, New York who qualify for membership and prioritize personal service, competitive auto loan rates, and convenient no-fee ATM access. The main caveat is the strict geographic service area limitation and small membership base, which means fewer customized products and features compared to larger credit unions or banks.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Affinity One — Credit Union in JAMESTOWN, NY | CreditDoc
